system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Detect Against Stealth, then Melee Against Evade (Special)
Type: Normal
Qi: 3

You use hearing and pinpoint the position of foes around you and unleash a flurry of precise strikes that send objects and debris toward them all. To use this ability you must first make a Detect roll against Stealth of everyone in a 20-foot radius per Rank of Qi. Then you may attack everyone you sense indirectly by striking objects or features around you to send items and/or debris at your foes in an oddly targeted way. Make a Melee roll against the Evade of all affected. Do normal Damage. Requirement: You must have the Blind Flaw and the Blind Swordsman Combat Technique to use this ability without a -2d10 penalty to both Skill rolls. Cathartic: You inhale deeply using your intuition and hearing to aim your strikes perfectly. This removes the -1d10 Penalty for any Targeted or Maim strike against foes using this Technique.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.requirementNotes: You must have the Blind Flaw and the Blind Swordsman Combat Technique to use this ability without a -2d10 penalty to both Skill rolls. You must first make a Detect roll against Stealth of everyone in a 20-foot radius per Rank of Qi.
